overall.description: First-person perspective walk along a futuristic elevated bridge at night in a cyberpunk city environment. A massive glass and steel industrial building dominates the left side while vehicles pass on the multi-lane road to the right. The scene features neon lighting, digital billboards, and high-quality game engine graphics characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bridge walkway with futuristic industrial building

events.description: white van passes by closely on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk of an elevated urban bridge

notable_agents.action: white van driving past on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: tall industrial building with exposed steel framework and illuminated windows dominating the left side
low concrete wall separating the sidewalk from the lower level on the left
multi-lane road with lane markings and passing vehicles
tall pole with bright rectangular light fixture illuminating the walkway
large illuminated advertising screen visible in the distance on the right

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic elevated bridge at night, with a massive glass and steel industrial building towering on the left. The camera walks forward along a concrete sidewalk separated from the road by a barrier, while a white van passes by on the right. Neon street lights and distant digital billboards illuminate the cyberpunk cityscape.

events.description: bright green sports car speeds past on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the bridge walkway as various vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: green sports car speeding past on the road

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along the elevated bridge with the industrial building now closer on the left. A bright green sports car speeds past on the road, followed by other vehicles. The grass patch from the earlier section is no longer visible as the path continues past the building facade.

events.description: taxi cab passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking toward the end of the bridge section with city lights visible ahead

notable_agents.action: taxi cab driving past on the road

entered.detail: distant intersection with traffic signals and crossing roads becoming visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach toward a distant intersection with city lights ahead. The industrial building recedes into the background on the left as a taxi passes by on the right. The walkway continues straight with consistent neon lighting from overhead street lamps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a futuristic elevated bridge that transitions from the shadow of a massive industrial complex toward a bright, distant city intersection. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beside a towering glass and steel building, moving forward as a white van passes on the adjacent multi-lane road under the glow of neon street lights. As the camera advances, the industrial facade looms closer on the left while a bright green sports car and other vehicles speed past in a blur of motion. The scene then shifts as the massive building begins to recede into the background, opening up the view toward the shimmering lights of the city ahead. Finally, the walkway continues straight under consistent overhead neon lighting as a taxi passes by on the right, leading the camera toward the far intersection.
